# Float

Positions an element relative to its parent using a placement-based API. Commonly used for badges, indicators, and labels on cards or avatars.

## Import

```jsx
import { Float } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| placement | `"top-start" \| "top-end" \| "bottom-start" \| "bottom-end" \| "top-center" \| "bottom-center" \| "middle-start" \| "middle-end" \| "middle-center"` | `top-end` | Position relative to parent |
| offset | `string \| number` | - | Offset from the edge |
| offsetX | `string \| number` | - | Horizontal offset |
| offsetY | `string \| number` | - | Vertical offset |
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Element to float |

## Usage

```jsx
<Box position="relative">
  <Avatar name="John" />
  <Float placement="bottom-end" offset="4">
    <Circle size="8px" bg="green.500" />
  </Float>
</Box>
```

## Features

- Declarative placement API
- Supports offset customization
- Works with any positioned parent
